entity.summary: Croatia-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded around 2013. Current official terms, fee schedules, system-status pages, and API documentation show an operating platform with cryptocurrency markets, deposits, withdrawals, and account services, so HEI corrects the previous inactive classification to active.
entity.notes: The active classification is based on multiple current first-party service pages, not merely a reachable homepage. The launch date remains year-level because the reviewed evidence does not establish one precise opening day.

expected.summary: Croatia-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2013. Current market-data trackers mark BitKonan as inactive, untracked, or without usable market data, so HEI models it as inactive rather than dead.
expected.notes: HEI models BitKonan as inactive rather than dead because the current evidence set supports historical operation and current lack of tracked market activity, but does not establish a definitive shutdown announcement or terminal date. Launch date is stored at year precision based on multiple secondary references to 2013 founding / launch; one tracker describes operation since 2014.

changes.summary: Croatia-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded around 2013. Current official terms, fee schedules, system-status pages, and API documentation show an operating platform with cryptocurrency markets, deposits, withdrawals, and account services, so HEI corrects the previous inactive classification to active.
changes.notes: The active classification is based on multiple current first-party service pages, not merely a reachable homepage. The launch date remains year-level because the reviewed evidence does not establish one precise opening day.

evidence.title: BitKonan Terms of Service
evidence.notes: Current terms describe active customer accounts and cryptocurrency trading services.

evidence.title: BitKonan API documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party API documentation exposes market-data, order, and account functionality.

evidence.title: BitKonan fees and limits
evidence.notes: Current fee schedule lists active trading, deposit, and withdrawal fees.
